title: HugoSMP Tweaks
description: Client-side quality-of-life tweaks for the HugoSMP server.
body:
## HugoSMP Tweaks

**HugoSMP Tweaks** is a **client-side Fabric mod** that provides quality-of-life improvements specifically designed for the **HugoSMP Minecraft server**.  
The mod focuses on improving usability and readability without changing gameplay mechanics.

---

### Features (more will be added soon)

#### Item Price Improvements
- Displays the **price per item** in the auction house in addition to the total stack price.
- Shows the **value per item** in item tooltips for stacked items.
- Fully configurable colors and display options.

#### Chat Filtering
Filter chat messages to reduce clutter and improve readability:
- Public chat messages
- System messages
- Private messages
- Clan messages
- Friend system messages

Each category can be enabled or disabled individually.

---

### Dependencies
- Fabric API  
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
- (optional) Mod Menu
  
**In order to configure the mod you will also need "Mod Menu" even though it isn't required for the mod to run!**

---

### Disclaimer
This mod is **not an official HugoSMP mod** and is **not affiliated with or endorsed by the HugoSMP server team**.  
It is an independent community project created to enhance the player experience.
